message:
shared: Remove overly broad Vault Token redaction pattern

The pattern `s\.[a-zA-Z0-9]{8,}` was matching JS/TS method calls like
`queries.getUserRepos` and `teams.findFirst`, causing false positives
in transcript redaction.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/y6fjolegbrlkki3qhjo7orfn

files.patch:
@@ -102,10 +102,6 @@ export const SECRET_PATTERNS: SecretPattern[] = [
     name: "DigitalOcean Token",
     regex: "dop_v1_[a-z0-9]{64}",
   },
-  {
-    name: "Vault Token",
-    regex: "s\\.[a-zA-Z0-9]{8,}",
-  },
   {
     name: "CircleCI Token",
     regex: "circle-token=[a-z0-9]{40}",
